name: fundamental-styles
description: Agent Skills for SAP fundamental-styles - CSS component library for Fiori Design System
author: SAP

skills.name: Component Guidance - Forms & Inputs
skills.description: Fiori guidelines for form controls and input components (26 components: Checkbox, Input, Select, Textarea, Date Picker, etc.)

skills.name: Component Guidance - Navigation
skills.description: Fiori guidelines for navigation components (8 components: Breadcrumb, Menu, Link, Shellbar, Vertical Navigation, etc.)

skills.name: Component Guidance - Layout & Containers
skills.description: Fiori guidelines for layout structures (11 components: Card, Panel, Dynamic Page, Flexible Column Layout, etc.)

skills.name: Component Guidance - Data Display
skills.description: Fiori guidelines for data display components (23 components: Table, List, Tree, Avatar, Calendar, Icons, etc.)

skills.name: Component Guidance - Feedback & Status
skills.description: Fiori guidelines for feedback components (15 components: Message Strip, Notification, Dialog, Progress Indicator, etc.)

skills.name: Component Guidance - Actions & Controls
skills.description: Fiori guidelines for action components (4 components: Button, Product Switch, User Menu, Scrollbar)

skills.name: Layout Patterns
skills.description: Common UI layout patterns using fundamental-styles - login forms, dashboards, master-detail, wizards, and more

skills.name: BEM Naming in Fundamental Styles
skills.description: BEM (Block Element Modifier) methodology and naming conventions used in fundamental-styles with real examples

skills.name: Component Composition
skills.description: How to combine fundamental-styles components correctly - required wrappers, nesting rules, and common composition patterns

skills.name: Content Density
skills.description: Guide to cozy, compact, and condensed modes - when to use each density, how to apply them, and device-specific recommendations

skills.name: Component Documentation Browser
skills.description: Browse complete component documentation with all HTML examples from auto-generated markdown files (140+ components)
